2024: In 2024, we focused on the issue of plastic waste and challenged ourselves to solve problems in plastic recycling. Our project, 'PET TWINS,' is a new system that promotes the industrial use of the enzyme 'PETase,' which specifically breaks down PET, as an effort to address such environmental issues.
2022: In 2022, we worked on developing biosensors using cell-free technology. Our project aimed to develop a home-use electrochemical biosensor specialized in detecting two hormones and an automatic sperm release capsule, which would improve the range of detection targets and output types.
2020: In 2020, we worked on a project that utilized intercellular communication. We depicted a story of a battle between zombie and samurai cells based on the concentration of signaling molecules. The two types of cells have a relationship where they suppress each other's gene expression, and the number of zombie and samurai cells changes according to the state of the gene circuit.
